title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For June 2023
text: Dividend aristocrats are struggling in 2023, with the ProShares S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats ETF down 4.71% in May. Three strategies for identifying winning aristocrats include focusing on undervalued stocks, fastest expected growth, and a blend of the two. Despite recent underperformance, long-term investors can find value in dividend aristocrats, as they have historically outperformed the S&P 500 index.

title: Is This High-Yield Stock a Buy for Passive Income?

title: T. Rowe Price Is Still on Sale. Is It Right for You?

title: 13 Blue-Chips For The Ultimate High-Yield Buffett-Style Dividend Aristocrat Portfolio

title: T. Rowe Price: Recovery Underway
text: For their first quarter, T. Rowe Price reported another period of year-over-year decline in operating income. Despite this decline in operating income, TROW reported an increase in AUM quarter over quarter.

title: Trust T. Rowe Price For The Long Haul

title: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, AUM Dips Y/Y
text: Despite a decline in net revenues, T. Rowe Price's (TROW) Q1 earnings beat estimates.

title: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: T. Rowe Price (TROW) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.69 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.62 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.62 per share a year ago.

title: Everyone Is Down on T. Rowe Price; Here's Why I Love It
text: T. Rowe Price's assets under management will rise again with the arrival of a new bull market. The company's dividend yield is almost triple that of the S&P 500.
